18s         Warning   Failed        pod/ledger-api-6c8f7d9b5-m4qkx    Error: couldn't find key DATABASE_URL in ConfigMap prod/ledger-runtime

timeline.cmd: kubectl get configmap ledger-runtime -n prod -o yaml
timeline.out:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: ledger-runtime
  namespace: prod
data:
  DB_URL: postgresql://ledger-primary.prod.svc:5432/ledger
  LOG_LEVEL: info
timeline.note: compare the deployed key with the available config

timeline.cause: The Deployment asks ConfigMap ledger-runtime for DATABASE_URL, but the recorded ConfigMap only contains DB_URL. Kubelet refuses to create every container before process start; the application image and probes have not run.
receipts: DATABASE_URL:  <set to the key 'DATABASE_URL' of config map 'ledger-runtime'>  Optional: false
Error: couldn't find key DATABASE_URL in ConfigMap prod/ledger-runtime

timeline.explain: Point the existing DATABASE_URL environment variable at the ConfigMap key that is actually present. This changes one pod-template reference and rolls the three blocked pods.
timeline.blast_radius: 1 Deployment · 3 blocked pods replaced · prod namespace · ledger-api only
timeline.followup: Pin the ConfigMap key contract in the chart schema and admission tests.

timeline.out: Error from server (Forbidden): deployments.apps "ledger-api" is forbidden: User "system:serviceaccount:helmsman:helmsman-agent" cannot patch resource "deployments" in API group "apps" in the namespace "prod"

timeline.text: The diagnosis stands. Helmsman remains read-only and drafts the smallest resource-scoped grant for cluster-admin review.
timeline.role_manifest:
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: helmsman-ledger-patcher
  namespace: prod
rules:
- apiGroups: ["apps"]
  resources: ["deployments"]
  resourceNames: ["ledger-api"]
  verbs: ["get", "patch"]
timeline.binding_manifest:
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: helmsman-ledger-patcher
  namespace: prod
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: helmsman-agent
  namespace: helmsman
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: helmsman-ledger-patcher

timeline.text: No mutation landed. All three ledger-api pods remain blocked; settlement writes stay paused pending cluster-admin review.
timeline.postmortem: API server denied deployments.apps/patch · no retry or privilege expansion · exact Role/RoleBinding staged for manual escalation

title: ledger-api config fix approved — API server denies the patch
